creator: umeno@rr.iij4u.or.jp
text:
Hello!

I'm a maintainer of this ports (games/ninix-aya)
This PR was sent by me.
I missed my mail address at this PR (ports/146217), sorry.
Please commit this PR.

From: Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.ORG>
Subject: Re: ports/146217: Maitainer Update: games/ninix-aya to 4.0.5
Date: Sat, 1 May 2010 11:50:45 UT

> Maintainer of games/ninix-aya,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/146217 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/146217
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
> 
--
Takashi UMENO
umeno@rr.iij4u.or.jp
